note: The live Venice model list on 2026-04-19 does not include kimi-2.7. term-llm returns a 404 and suggests kimi-k2-5 or kimi-k2-thinking.
command: Build the board described in SPEC.md. Create or replace workspace/board.html. Use the verify_board tool repeatedly until it passes. When the board passes, reply DONE.
command_text: term-llm ask --no-session --text --stats --yolo --provider venice:kimi-k2-5 --max-turns 30 --agent ./agent --read-dir . --write-dir ./workspace -f ./SPEC.md "Build the board described in SPEC.md. Create or replace workspace/board.html. Use the verify_board tool repeatedly until it passes. When the board passes, reply DONE."
prompt: Build the board described in SPEC.md. Create or replace workspace/board.html. Use the verify_board tool repeatedly until it passes. When the board passes, reply DONE.

stats.raw: Stats: 58.2s (llm 56.7s + tool 1.5s) | 12k in (cache: 8.1k read) → 4.1k out (last: 8.1k→22, peak: 8.1k) | 2 tools | 3 llm calls
